title: Observer Patch Holography Updates
description: Public OPH links, with one certified incomplete-map root, one global fixed-point target, explicit open physical maps, OPH Textbooks, Reverse Engineering Reality, simulation, paper summaries, physics unification, cosmology, essays, lab, and challenge updates.

items.title: OPH Paper Summaries
items.summary: HTML summaries of the Observer Patch Holography paper stack, with claim-status boundaries and links to the formal PDFs.

items.title: Standard Model Unified with Gravity via OPH
items.summary: The focused OPH entry page for the Standard Model unified with gravity, connecting the compact paper to the Lorentz/null-modular/Einstein branch, realized Standard Model quotient, and two closure-defined constants.

items.title: Cosmological Constant Capacity Target via OPH
items.summary: The conditional OPH de Sitter screen-capacity route: measured Lambda locates the comparison coordinate, while the physical readback map and fixed-point certificate remain open.

items.title: Physics Unification via OPH
items.summary: The direct public entry page for OPH as a zero-dial physics-unification framework (zero quantitative inputs at the theory layer; working borrows counted in the scorecard) connecting gravity, quantum theory, particles, records, observers, and simulation theory.

items.title: OPH Mini-Universe Simulation
items.summary: Interactive OPH mini-universe explorer showing observer patches, overlap readback, inconsistency repair, records, and emergent geometry.

items.title: Floating Pragma Blog
items.summary: Public OPH essays and entry points connecting observer consistency to meaning, computation, semiotics, and broader physics interpretation.

items.title: OPH Applications
items.summary: The OPH applications page for hardware, compute, energy, AGI, lift, and optical chamber consensus.

items.title: OPH Coherence Map
items.summary: The public graph surface for OPH concepts, overlaps, and cross-domain routes.

items.title: Three-Body Problem OPH Demo
items.summary: An extra simulator and proof walk-through for the OPH three-body problem solution, framed as a loop holonomy gluing example.

items.title: OPH Textbooks
items.summary: The guided study surface and the best structured route into the OPH derivations.

items.title: Reverse Engineering Reality
items.summary: The book-length narrative route into Observer Patch Holography and the full research framework.

items.title: Stress-Test Observer Patch Holography
items.summary: Use the OPH NotebookLM source notebook, public essays, OPH Lab, papers, repository, and public challenge to test the incomplete local endpoint map, global capacity target, and observable-conversion contracts. Detailed objections should go to tom@floatingpragma.io.

items.title: OPH License and Anti-Patent Covenant
items.summary: The canonical repository license and OPH open-use anti-patent covenant, with PATENTS.md carrying copy/paste website notices.

items.title: OPH NotebookLM Source Notebook
items.summary: Ask the source notebook for the strongest objection, the proof chain behind a claim, or the empirical pressure point most likely to break OPH.

items.title: Semiotics and the Physics of Meaning
items.summary: The bridge from signs, interpretation, shared codes, and meaning to observer overlap and stable public records.

items.title: P = NP on the Observer Screen
items.summary: An essay on verification, mismatch detection, local repair, proof-of-work, and stable records as OPH computational primitives. It is not a classical P = NP proof claim.

items.title: The Trigger
items.summary: A public entry point into the OPH claim and its broader stakes.
